title: griffonia tessmannii
intro: Griffonia tessmannii, also known as the African yohimbe or yohimbe tree, is a plant native to West and Central Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally used in African folk medicine, Griffonia tessmannii contains a number of bioactive compounds, including yohimbine, which has been found to have medicinal properties such as vasodilation and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Griffonia tessmannii include improved cardiovascular health, increased libido, and enhanced weight loss, as well as potential benefits in managing anxiety and depression. Griffonia tessmannii is typically prepared as a herbal tea, extract, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine and supplements.
